## Summary

Adds `docs/architecture/phase-architecture-v2.md` as the canonical architecture note for the evaluation lifecycle.

This document freezes the intended naming and orchestration boundaries before runtime changes:

- Phase 0 = Governance Warmup
- Phase 1A = Story Layer lane
- Pass 3A = independent Preflight Scout lane
- Review Gate = derived from Story Layer + quality report + gate-valid Pass 3A
- Phase 2 = Criteria Analysis
- Phase 3B = Synthesis
- Quality Gate = deterministic validation, not WAVE
- WAVE Revision = post-evaluation revision planning

## Key doctrine

- Pass 3A is not Phase 0.
- Quality Gate is not WAVE.
- WAVE is not Pass 4 unless the old Pass 4 Quality Gate name is retired repo-wide.
- Degraded is gate-valid only with structured proof.
- Failed is never gate-valid.
- Review Gate readiness must be derived from artifacts and gate-valid states.

## Why

The repo already contains most of the machinery, but the architecture boundary is muddy around Phase 1A and Pass 3A. This PR establishes the source of truth before splitting runtime execution and hardening gates.

## Acceptance

- [ ] Architecture doc exists.
- [ ] Canonical lifecycle is documented.
- [ ] Pass 3A / Phase 1A / Quality Gate / WAVE naming is explicit.
- [ ] Degraded vs failed semantics are explicit.
